target: Make the machine an oiled machine: terse directive-only instruction files, zero fiction/external-naming, minimal context per loop iteration. Same behavior, fewer moving parts.

canonical.law: Machine law lives in agents/default.md; project layer in /.proj/.
canonical.real_proj_layout: agent.md, project.md (SINGLE file), glossary.csv, personas/ + personas.md, plans/, skills/. NO .proj/config/, NO .proj/project/ dir. Canonical initializer = /bootstrap.
canonical.sole_driver_rule: Run this /improve loop from ONE session only. improve.json has no lock; concurrent cron drivers caused lost writes (incident e193515d). One cron = one writer.
canonical.terseness_pattern: Cut dup-frontmatter prose (Primary-Mission/Core-Capabilities/Scope-Boundaries = SSOT violation), Phase/Step narrative, time estimates, false-precision metrics, and FICTION (nonexistent configs/agents/commands/paths). KEEP all real facts + [HARD] rules + delegation + done-when. Verify frontmatter + skills refs intact after each edit. Prefer root-cause reconciliation over blind trimming when content describes things that do not exist.
canonical.done: External naming eliminated (moai/spool/mo.ai/Yoda/R2-D2 = 0). 3 fictional framework skill-trees de-fictionalized to single truthful files (foundation-core, foundation-quality, workflow-testing; 68 dead files pruned). Slices 1-5,7,8 complete. Self-install = README Agent Install Protocol. Terse so far: builder-agent/-plugin, manager-strategy/-docs/-spec/-git/-ddd/-project, expert-backend/-refactoring/-security.

follow_ups: Glossary sweep (.proj/glossary.csv) for ambiguous machine terms.
Sweep residual TRUST-5/MX/TAG-chain jargon machine-wide (manager-quality done: aligned to foundation-quality's five dimensions, no TRUST-5 label).
Verify kern memory wiring: ingest/query when mcp__kern__* is connected (per-session availability varies).
